channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: All eyes on Orion’s heat shield: Artemis 2 astronauts will hit Earth's atmosphere at nearly 24,000 mph on April 10 - Space

item.title: Scientists say the world’s oldest octopus fossil isn’t an octopus after all - AP News
item.description:

  4. 'Oldest octopus' fossil is no octopus at all, scans reveal  Phys.org
  5. This Fossil Once Rewrote Everything We Knew About Octopuses. Turns Out, It's Not An Octopus At All  IFLScience

item.title: One DNA letter can trigger complete sex reversal - Phys.org
item.description:

item.title: This Company Is Launching 4,000 Orbiting ‘Sky Mirrors’ to Beam Sunlight Down to Earth After Dark. Scientists Want It Stopped Now - Indian Defence Review
